name: INFLAMMATORY PSEUDOTUMOR
definition: INFLAMMATORY MYOBLASTIC PSEUDOTUMOR = PLASMA CELL GRANULOMA = PLASMACYTOMA = rare mass characterized by fibroblastic / myofibroblastic spindle cell proliferation with

demographics.Associated with: minor trauma, surgery, malignancy, occult infection (Epstein-Barr virus,
demographics.Prevalence: < 1% of all tumors of lung + airways
demographics.Path: nonencapsulated circumscribed nodular mass, occasionally with infiltrative margins
demographics.Histo: mixture of inflammatory cells (plasma cells, lymphocytes, eosinophils, neutrophils) +

discriminating_features: solid process with variable echogenicity ± Doppler flow

US: solid process with variable echogenicity ± Doppler flow
